title: クライマックス2戦目にむけて

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the second race, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I've seen up close how hard you two have worked
for this moment...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
So I know you'll put on an amazing performance
in this race!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Excellent! Seeing all these Umamusume in their biggest moment—why, it's enough to make my heart twinge.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Let's cheer hard for all of them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers for <chrname> roar
throughout the stands. We're going to win this
race, too!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Let's cheer hard for all of them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If we're going to claim the title of "greatest," then
we can't afford to lose this next race!
